name: Nikesh Arora
background: Nikesh Arora has served as our Chief Executive Officer and Chairman of our Board since June 2018. Prior to joining us, Mr. Arora served as President and Chief Operating Officer of SoftBank Group Corp. from October 2014 to June 2016. From 2004 to 2014, Mr. Arora held various positions at Google Inc., most recently as Senior Vice President and Chief Business Officer.

commpanies.name: Palo Alto Networks, Inc.
commpanies.title_or_role: Chief Executive Officer and Chairman of the Board
